message:
Preserve search filters across URL routing and back-navigation

Search filters (agent, time preset, since/until) now survive page
navigation: symbolic time presets encode as ?time=week instead of raw
timestamps, and the viewer restores full filter state from the URL via
parseSearchParams + setSearchRoute. Back-navigation from a conversation
rebuilds the search path with the current query and filters instead of
resetting to home.

Also adds rerenderSettingsUI() helper so settings rollback paths
(cancellation, failures in storage mode / OPFS toggles) rerender from
canonical state instead of manually toggling individual controls.

Includes tests for URL round-tripping of symbolic time filters, route
state restoration assertions, and settings rerender coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
